text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm walking through the shopping street with
Winning Ticket on our day off.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Huh, is someone wagging their tail over there?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On closer inspection, there's a girl walking to and
fro, her tail flicking side to side.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Oooh! It's her—it's Yuki!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: HEEEY! YUKIIII!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Oh, wowie! It's Tickezo! I thought an avalanche
was comin' or something!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Haha, sorry about that! So what are you doing
out here? Shopping?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Urghh... Well, the thing is...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
It's our day off, so I picked up all the courage I
darn well could t'go buy some hip new duds.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
'Cause you know, I'm tryin' hard t'be a proper city
girl! But then...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
I feel so outta place in this uniform, an' the
crowd's so thick, I can't take a single 'nother step
from this spot!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, I see... I mean, not really, but it sounds like
you're in trouble!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
How about I come with you? I wanted to look at
clothes too!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Really?!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
I couldn't ask a true blue city girl like y'self to
accomp'ny me!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Huuuh? A-am I a city girl?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
No, no, if you want a real city girl, you'd really be
better off asking City herself!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Nuh-uh! You're a prop'r city girl to me, Tickezo!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Like those clothes you're wearin'—you make them
look so fash'nable! I'm sure they'd just look like
plain ol' PJs if I tried'm...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Wow, y-you really think so? Hehehe...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: No foolin'! How d'you pick your clothes anyhow?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Umm, first off, they have to be easy to move in.
And I get a lot of hand-me-downs from my
brother!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Those are a little big, but they're totally my
style! ♪

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Well, is that a fact?! No wond'r you look so
natur'lly stylish!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
But how 'bout me? What should I do t'pick
clothes without lookin' like I try too hard?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Uuuhhh... Honestly, I don't know anything about
fashion...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Traineeerrr! Help!
choice_data_list: Search really hard for something that suits you.
Being fashionable is about showing restraint!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Oohhh! That sounds like something a pro would
say!
choice_data_list:
Find clothes that look like they're meant for
you.

text_block_list.name: Ticket and Yukino
text_block_list.text: Oh... Ooohhh!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Awesome! Such fashion wisdom!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Golly! Your trainer's a bonafide genius!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Let's go search for clothes that suit you, Yuki!
We'll look SUPER hard!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Thanks a bunch! I think I'm ready!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Great! The search begiiins!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We spend the rest of the day walking around the
stores and judging outfits, until we can barely
take another step.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Huh? What's that mean?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Oh! That's kinda similar to what City was sayin'!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
"If you have an image of yourself, stick to it, even
if it means putting up with heels or cold in the
winter."

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
"It's great to find clothes that suit you. But
sometimes it's worth fitting yourself to the look
instead," she said!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Wooow! That's City for you, the master of
fashion!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Gasp! Wait, but if that was a fashion master's wisdom... And Trainer just said basically the same thing...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Gasp! That's right! You're not just a trainer...

text_block_list.name: Ticket and Yukino
text_block_list.text: You're a master of fashion yourself!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Yuki, let's get all the ideas we can from our
fashion master!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! Any clothes that a master chooses will be a
surefire hit!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After being so highly rated by these two honest
Umamusume, I end up having to give my opinion
for the rest of the shopping trip.
